description: A type is a reusable element that can be connected with other types over ports.

variant.description: The optional variant of the type. No variant means the default variant.

items.description: A representation is a link to a resource that describes a type for a certain level of detail and tags.

mime.description: The Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions (MIME) type of the content of the resource of the representation.

lod.description: The optional Level of Detail/Development/Design (LoD) of the representation. No lod means the default lod.

tags.description: The optional tags to group representations. No tags means default.

items.description: A port is a connection point (with a direction) of a type.

point.description: The connection point of the port that is attracted to another connection point.

direction.description: The direction of the port. When another piece connects the direction of the other port is flipped and then the pieces are aligned.

items.description: A locator is meta-data for grouping ports.

subgroup.description: The optional sub-group of the locator. No sub-group means true.

items.description: A quality is a named value with a unit and a definition.

value.description: The optional value [ text | url ] of the quality. No value is equivalent to true for the name.

unit.description: The optional unit of the value of the quality.
